title: work docs notifications in: project name in notification email
excerpt: It would be great if the work docs notifications sent via email have the board name in the subject line of the email. It just shows Doc Comment + the actual comment. Be great to have this feature.

posts.author: sswale (Sandra Swale)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if the work docs notifications sent via email have the board name in the subject line of the email. It just shows Doc Comment + the actual comment. Be great to have this feature.

posts.author: SoloAnt (Solomon)
posts.cookedHtml:
YES 10000000000000 Times!!!

I can’t belive that the actual board name isn’t in any of the email subjects if you are tagged.

I found this from 2-3 years ago Monday.com Answers: Can I customize my email notifications?

Where similar things are talked about being add.

" However, this is a feature we get requests for quite often, and we’re working on bringing it to monday.com soon, so stay tuned!"

Seems like with a lot of request and it’s as old as it is this should be done already.

Even the OG post here is 1 year… really hoping this is added soon.
